texto: The thing about pain, whether physical or emotional, is there's no running away. You can't escape it and you can't hide from it. Not by ignoring it, not by drugging it, not by doing a swan dive into a bottle. Sooner or later you'll have to take a breath, let the pain rush in and get to the other side like your life depends on it. Because it does.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Natasha Boyd: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “The thing about pain, whether physical or emotional, is there's no running away. You can't escape…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, coping, emotion pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e termino.
